Overview: Olympic Circuit Technology Co., Ltd is engaged in the research, development, manufacture, and sales of printed circuit boards (PCBs) both in China and internationally, with a market cap of CN¥44.14 billion.

Insider Ownership: 20.1%

Olympic Circuit Technology shows significant forecasted earnings growth of 45.63% annually, outpacing the Chinese market average. Revenue is also expected to grow at 29.5% per year, exceeding market expectations. Despite these positive forecasts, recent financial results show a decline in net income and profit margins compared to the previous year. The company's dividend yield of 1.04% is not well-covered by free cash flows, and its stock has experienced high volatility recently without notable insider trading activity.
